question: What is the position of the sliced tomato in the image? Select from the following options: (A) At the center of the image. (B) On the left side of the image. (C) On the right side of the image. (D) At the bottom of the image.
gold_answer: At the bottom of the image
answer_choices: At the center of the image
On the left side of the image
On the right side of the image
At the bottom of the image

qwen_prompt_object.inpaint_prompt: Sliced tomato clearly visible at the center of the glass, above the liquid level.
qwen_prompt_object.negative_prompt: No tomato slices at the bottom of the image, only liquid and glass base.

inpaint_prompt_used: Sliced tomato clearly visible at the center of the glass, above the liquid level.
